ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community where the crime occurred */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community where the crime occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the crime occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the crime occurred */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the crime occurred */,
  "arrest" INTEGER /* Whether an arrest was made */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Whether the crime was domestic-related */,
  "firearm" INTEGER /* Whether a firearm was involved */,
  "secondary_description" TEXT /* Secondary description of the crime */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "crime_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime (e.g., open, closed, under investigation) */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "suspect_age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "suspect_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "suspect_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspect */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer assigned to the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Median income of the community */,
  "latino" REAL /* Percentage of Latino population */,
  "black" REAL /* Percentage of Black population */,
  "white" REAL /* Percentage of White population */,
  "asian" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "other" REAL /* Percentage of Other population */,
  "iucr" REAL /* Index of crime rates */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the community */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the community */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Predominant type of housing */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* Availability and quality of public transportation */,
  "community_programs" INTEGER /* Number of community programs and initiatives */,
  "crime_prevention_programs" INTEGER /* Number of crime prevention programs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_crime_rates" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate for the community */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime rate was calculated */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the crime rate was calculated */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes */,
  "violent_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of violent crimes */,
  "property_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of property crimes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id", "year", "month")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "legal_statute" TEXT /* Relevant legal statute or law */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the crime type in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime */,
  "primary_type" INTEGER /* Primary type of the crime */,
  "secondary_type" INTEGER /* Secondary type of the crime */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crime */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the crime occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the crime occurred */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Description of evidence collected */,
  "arrest_made" INTEGER /* Whether an arrest was made during the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service */,
  "training_completed" TEXT /* Training programs completed */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations or areas of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officer_incidents" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the officer's role in the incident */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken by the officer */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the officer's involvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id", "incident_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each crime incident
ID of the community where the crime occurred
Name of the community where the crime occurred
Status of the crime (e.g., open, closed, under investigation)
ID of the officer assigned to the case
Average education level in the community
Availability and quality of public transportation
Number of community programs and initiatives
Year the crime rate was calculated
Month the crime rate was calculated
Unique identifier for each crime type
Severity level of the crime (e.g., low, medium, high)
Frequency of the crime type in the city
Status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved)
Whether an arrest was made during the incident
Role of the officer in the incident
Description of the officer's role in the incident
